annotations.text: The temporal sequence—systemic prodrome followed by a resolving discharge and then a painful ulcer—provides important clues for narrowing the differenti
if the ulcer were syphilitic, one would expect a rapid clinical response, yet the case description does not comment on ulcer improvement after therapy.
The patient received a full dose of benzathine penicillin G (the recommended treatment for primary syphilis) *after* the ulcer appeared;
